description:
Fold TypeTest statements and Term::If terminators when the test variable has a singleton type (known statically). Removes dead branches at compile time.

## Acceptance
- Singleton TypeTest folded to a Stmt::Assign of the constant.
- Term::If with singleton condition folded to Goto.
- Tests pass.

## Commit
fz-ty1.opt.1 (already landed in commit 6885a02d)
title: fz-ty1.opt.1: ir_fold — singleton fold for TypeTest stmts and Term::If terminators
